passage: Recently, public transportation has become very popular in Toronto. Since 2013, many residents gather on weekends. Tom, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 431 more events related to public transportation.
explanation: 準1級 模擬テスト7 読解 3 正解は「On weekends.」。文脈に最も自然な表現です。 他の選択肢は次の通りです：「I have no idea」: 文脈と合わない表現； 「I cannot tell」: 文脈と合わない表現； 「Not sure」: 文脈と合わない表現。
